name: Dog Biscuits ( Doggie Treats That Are Good Fo
recipeInstructions:
1. Use butter, margarine, shortening, or meat juices instead of regular butter.
2. Combine the flour, milk, salt, garlic powder, and sugar in a bowl.
3. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
4. Mix in the beaten egg.
5. Gradually add ice water to form a dough.
6. Place the dough on a lightly oiled cookie sheet.
7. Pat the dough to about 1/2 inch thickness.
8. Cut out shapes with a cookie cutter or biscuit cutter.
9. Bake on the cookie sheet for 25 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
10. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
11. To vary flavor and texture, add pureed cooked green vegetables or carrots, whole wheat or rye kernels, or liver powder (available in health food stores) when mixing the egg.
